title: Audit the three installed skill packages and decide the exact rollback shape
detail: Compare each target folder's `SKILL.md` and `SUPERPOWERS-FALLBACK.md`, identify which sibling files are template-only, and confirm the rollback should preserve only plain markdown skill assets.

title: Revert the three target installed skills to plain markdown form
detail: Replace the compiled claw-entry `SKILL.md` with the original fallback content for `using-superpowers`, `writing-plans`, and `writing-skills`, then remove template-only assets that are no longer part of a plain skill package.

title: Verify the installed plugin state after rollback
detail: Re-list the three skill folders, inspect the resulting `SKILL.md` headers, and confirm other installed superpowers skill folders remain present and untouched.

title: Close out the rollback round
detail: Record the outcome, note whether any reusable truth is worth depositing, and finish the claw plan cleanly.
